name: @decomp-studio/desktop
description: Desktop studio for Pokemon GBA decomp hackroms

scripts.build: pnpm typecheck && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --external:electron --outfile=dist/main.js --sourcemap && esbuild src/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=cjs --external:electron --outfile=dist/preload.cjs --sourcemap
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @decomp-studio/web dev & pnpm exec wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env HACKROM_STUDIO_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
